name: Sunset Bronson Studios
notes: Large TV/streaming production lot on Sunset with frequent episodic volume; good fit for overflow ADR, dialogue editing, and mix support relationships.

name: Sunset Gower Studios
notes: Active soundstage campus with episodic, indie, and branded shoots; strong target for post referrals from producers and line producers on lot.

name: Sunset Las Palmas Studios
address: 1040 N Las Palmas Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90038
notes: Former Hollywood Center Studios campus with steady TV/commercial activity; nearby producers may need ADR pickups and dialogue editorial help.

name: Silver Layne Studios
address: 6630 Sunset Blvd, Suite 102, Los Angeles, CA 90028
notes: Small Hollywood production space on Sunset with creative tenants and casting activity; plausible source of indie content and VO referrals.

name: Third Wheel Podcast Studio
address: 1947 N Cahuenga Blvd, Suite 110, Los Angeles, CA 90068
notes: Podcast and creator studio near Cahuenga. Worth pitching dialogue cleanup, trailer mixes, branded podcast post, and talent-directed pickups.

name: Titmouse Los Angeles
notes: Animation studio in the Media District. Good ADR/VO target for animatics, pickups, scratch tracks, and episodic animation post support.

name: Raleigh Studios Hollywood
notes: Long-running Melrose lot with stages and production offices; a practical outreach target for stage tenants and physical-production coordinators.

name: Helgoth & Associates Casting
notes: Commercial casting office close to Argyle. Casting teams can be a strong channel for VO, ADR pickups, and fast-turn producer intros.

name: Elaine Craig Voice Casting
address: 6464 Sunset Blvd, Suite 1150, Los Angeles, CA 90028
notes: Voice casting specialist for animation, film, commercials, games, and digital work. Strong adjacency to ADR, looping, and remote VO sessions.

name: Bloc Agency Los Angeles
notes: Talent agency in the Taft Building at Vine. Useful relationship target for VO talent access, referrals, and production-side intros.

name: MSA Agency Los Angeles
address: 1112 N Sherbourne Dr, West Hollywood, CA 90069
notes: Choreography and talent agency with a nearby LA office. Could surface branded content, performance capture, and music-adjacent post leads.

name: Hollywood Production Center
address: 1149 N Gower St, Los Angeles, CA 90038
notes: Multi-tenant production campus 0.5 mi from Studio Awesome with dozens of production company tenants. Each tenant is a potential ADR/mix client.

name: Reel FX Animation
address: 1149 N Gower St, Suite V-103, Hollywood, CA 90038
notes: Animation studio at Hollywood Production Center (same campus as HPC). Feature animation + VFX; strong ADR/VO pipeline need for animatics, scratch tracks, and final dialogue recording.

name: Panoramic Media Company
notes: Indie film & TV production company (fka Glickmania) founded by veteran producer Jonathan Glickman. Active franchise/TV/podcast slate — strong ADR and dialogue post prospect, 1.2 mi from Studio Awesome.

name: Hollywood Production Center 4
address: 6350 Santa Monica Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90038
notes: Second HPC campus on Santa Monica Blvd in the heart of the media district. Multi-tenant offices with dozens of active production companies — each a potential ADR/mix client. 1.4 mi from Studio Awesome.

name: Picture Head
notes: Full-service post production finishing at 1132 Vine — 0.5 mi from Studio Awesome. Worldwide finishing for film/episodic/commercial. Strong fit for ADR overflow and dialogue post collaboration.

name: Stampede Studios
notes: Full-service creative marketing + post finishing on Highland Ave, 1 mi from Studio Awesome. Specializes in trailers and studio finishing. Brian Petillo is Post Producer & Business Development — ideal direct contact for ADR/mix referrals.

name: Buffalo 8 Post-Production
notes: Full-service post production on Sunset Blvd (6500), 1.5 mi from Studio Awesome. Editorial, color, sound design, VFX, delivery. 2-time Emmy winner. Good ADR pickup and sound referral target.
